mdSummary:
# Resizable

Draggable splitter for resizable panel layouts.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Layout
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/resizable

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Resizable | Context | `ResizablePanelGroup.ResizablePanelGroupContext` | `default!` |  |
| Resizable | PanelIndex | `int` | `` |  |
| Resizable | WithHandle | `bool` | `` |  |
| Resizable | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Resizable | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| ResizablePanel | Context | `ResizablePanelGroup.ResizablePanelGroupContext` | `default!` |  |
| ResizablePanel | Order | `int` | `` |  |
| ResizablePanel | DefaultSize | `double` | `50` |  |
| ResizablePanel | MinSize | `double` | `10` |  |
| ResizablePanel | MaxSize | `double` | `90` |  |
| ResizablePanel | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| ResizablePanel | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| ResizablePanel | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| ResizablePanelGroup | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| ResizablePanelGroup | Direction | `ResizableDirection` | `ResizableDirection.Horizontal` |  |
| ResizablePanelGroup | DefaultSizes | `double[]?` | `` |  |
| ResizablePanelGroup | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| ResizablePanelGroup | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (ResizablePanel) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (ResizablePanelGroup) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- `ResizableHandle`, `ResizablePanel`, `ResizablePanelGroup`

## Cascading values it expects
- `Context` (`ResizablePanelGroup.ResizablePanelGroupContext`)

## Services it injects
- `ComponentInteropService` ()

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Resizable />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-border`, `--color-primary`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Resizable/ResizableHandle.razor`
- `UI/Resizable/ResizablePanel.razor`
- `UI/Resizable/ResizablePanelGroup.razor`
